tagged_types.name: Stream_Type
tagged_types.code:
type Stream_Type is
   new Ada.Streams.Root_Stream_Type with private;

access_types.name: Stream_Access
access_types.code: type Stream_Access is access all Ada.Streams.Root_Stream_Type'Class;

subprograms.name: Create

documentation.description:
Create the Comression/Decompression stream.
If mode is In_Stream then Write operation is disabled.
If mode is Out_Stream then Read operation is disabled.

subprograms.name: Flush

documentation.description:
Flush the written data to the back stream,
all data placed to the compressor is flushing to the Back stream.
Should not be used untill necessary, becouse it is decreasing
compression.

subprograms.name: Read
Read_Total_In
subprograms.code: function Read_Total_In (Stream : in Stream_Type) return Count

documentation.description: Return total number of bytes read from back stream so far.

subprograms.name: Read_Total_Out
subprograms.code: function Read_Total_Out (Stream : in Stream_Type) return Count

documentation.description: Return total number of bytes read so far.

subprograms.name: Write
Write_Total_In
subprograms.code: function Write_Total_In (Stream : in Stream_Type) return Count

documentation.description: Return total number of bytes written so far.

subprograms.name: Write_Total_Out
subprograms.code: function Write_Total_Out (Stream : in Stream_Type) return Count

documentation.description: Return total number of bytes written to the back stream.
